title: Cat meme spider  耄耋蜘蛛
description: It was made for arachnophobia, I guess
body:
It was made for arachnophobia, I guess

This is a cute cat. Let it replace the terrifying spider. I hope it can bring you a little happiness

It was a very simple resourcepacks, and by the way, it solved the annoying noise of the spider

![cute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fb0edf5a2eb996cf17b0ad7c158a040ba4d7c89.jpeg)
